TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_cinmmyan, title = cinmmyan, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/cinmmyan} }

S.FORM: kkayal sa kay' na cinmmyan hya' ga, mutuw pin'qun kmayal na squliq maha tmmyan ma, ga tmmyan hya' ga ini' tmmiy na' ga yasa qu sawn maha tmmyan maku' na' sawn, ru cyuw su' syan cimu' ru mami' lga, yasa qu sawn maha cyux tmmyan sawn la. nanu' iy mhuqil lqu cin mami' qasa lga, ini' say maha tmmyan la, cinmmyan sawn kmayal la. yalaw gi skahul sa gaga' na qnxan 'tayal mita' lga, yasa qu sawn maha gaga na qnxan 'tayal la. sraral hiya' ga, kya qu inlwan ta qsinu ini ga saysyam, i~pzyux iyal ru iyat psi suqi maniq ga, yasa qu mutux naha' tmmyan ru ttkuhun naha' rmamatla. nanu' kya qu lpyung mwah mkal lga, ungat qu nnaga' naha' lga, sayux naha' uzi lru nanu' yaqu cinmmyan qaniy qu snaga' naha' lpyung la. yalaw gi wal mhuqil lqu sni' naha' mami' ka hayhi' na qqsinuw ini' ga qulih lga, yasa qu sawn naha' cinmmyan la. yalaw gi ini' uluw iyal nniqun qnxan naha' sraral ru, nanak yani qu blaq naha' balay niqun,sawyan maniq kwara' na 'tayal uzi gi nanak yaniy qu kinbbaqan naha' kbalay la. kya qu cimu' ru mami' ga, baqun tmami' qu qulih ru qsinu la.

kkayal sa kay' na cinmmyan hya' ga, mutuw pin'qun kmayal na squliq maha tmmyan ma, ga tmmyan hya' ga ini' tmmiy na' ga yasa qu sawn maha tmmyan maku' na' sawn, ru cyuw su' syan cimu' ru mami' lga, yasa qu sawn maha cyux tmmyan sawn la. nanu' iy mhuqil lqu cin mami' qasa lga, ini' say maha tmmyan la, cinmmyan sawn kmayal la. yalaw gi skahul sa gaga' na qnxan 'tayal mita' lga, yasa qu sawn maha gaga na qnxan 'tayal la. sraral hiya' ga, kya qu inlwan ta qsinu ini ga saysyam, i~pzyux iyal ru iyat psi suqi maniq ga, yasa qu mutux naha' tmmyan ru ttkuhun naha' rmamatla. nanu' kya qu lpyung mwah mkal lga, ungat qu nnaga' naha' lga, sayux naha' uzi lru nanu' yaqu cinmmyan qaniy qu snaga' naha' lpyung la. yalaw gi wal mhuqil lqu sni' naha' mami' ka hayhi' na qqsinuw ini' ga qulih lga, yasa qu sawn naha' cinmmyan la. yalaw gi ini' uluw iyal nniqun qnxan naha' sraral ru, nanak yani qu blaq naha' balay niqun,sawyan maniq kwara' na 'tayal uzi gi nanak yaniy qu kinbbaqan naha' kbalay la. kya qu cimu' ru mami' ga, baqun tmami' qu qulih ru qsinu la.
S.PHON: kkajal s~ɕa kajʔ na ʦ~ʨinmmjan ħjaʔ ɣa, mutuw pinʔqun kmajal na s~ɕquliq maħa tmmjan ma, ɣa tmmjan ħjaʔ ɣa iniʔ tmmij naʔ ɣa jas~ɕa qu s~ɕawn maħa tmmjan makuʔ naʔ s~ɕawn, ru ʦ~ʨjuw s~ɕuʔ s~ɕjan ʦ~ʨimuʔ ru mamiʔ lɣa, jas~ɕa qu s~ɕawn maħa ʦ~ʨjux tmmjan s~ɕawn la. nanuʔ ij mħuqil lqu ʦ~ʨin mamiʔ qas~ɕa lɣa, iniʔ s~ɕaj maħa tmmjan la, ʦ~ʨinmmjan s~ɕawn kmajal la. jalaw ɣi s~ɕkaħul s~ɕa ɣaɣaʔ na qnxan ʔtajal mitaʔ lɣa, jas~ɕa qu s~ɕawn maħa ɣaɣa na qnxan ʔtajal la. s~ɕraral ħijaʔ ɣa, kja qu inlwan ta qs~ɕinu ini ɣa s~ɕajs~ɕjam, i~pzjux ijal ru ijat ps~ɕi s~ɕuqi maniq ɣa, jas~ɕa qu mutux naħaʔ tmmjan ru ttkuħun naħaʔ rmamatla. nanuʔ kja qu lpjuŋ mwaħ mkal lɣa, uŋat qu nnaɣaʔ naħaʔ lɣa, s~ɕajux naħaʔ uzi lru nanuʔ jaqu ʦ~ʨinmmjan qanij qu s~ɕnaɣaʔ naħaʔ lpjuŋ la. jalaw ɣi wal mħuqil lqu s~ɕniʔ naħaʔ mamiʔ ka ħajħiʔ na qqs~ɕinuw iniʔ ɣa quliħ lɣa, jas~ɕa qu s~ɕawn naħaʔ ʦ~ʨinmmjan la. jalaw ɣi iniʔ uluw ijal nniqun qnxan naħaʔ s~ɕraral ru, nanak jani qu βlaq naħaʔ βalaj niqun,s~ɕawjan maniq kwaraʔ na ʔtajal uzi ɣi nanak janij qu kinββaqan naħaʔ kβalaj la. kja qu ʦ~ʨimuʔ ru mamiʔ ɣa, βaqun tmamiʔ qu quliħ ru qs~ɕinu la.
